title: Circle Calculator
description:
Build a set of math utility functions for circle and angle calculations.

1. `circle_area(radius)` — Returns the area of a circle (π × r²), rounded to 2 decimal places
2. `circle_circumference(radius)` — Returns the circumference (2 × π × r), rounded to 2 decimal places
3. `sphere_volume(radius)` — Returns the volume of a sphere (4/3 × π × r³), rounded to 2 decimal places
4. `degrees_to_radians(degrees)` — Converts degrees to radians, rounded to 4 decimal places

Use `math.pi` for π.

Examples:
  circle_area(5) → 78.54
  circle_circumference(5) → 31.42
  sphere_volume(3) → 113.1
  degrees_to_radians(180) → 3.1416
starterCode:

hints: Use round(value, decimal_places) to round results

testCases.description: circle_area should calculate area for radius 5
circle_circumference should calculate circumference for radius 5
sphere_volume should calculate volume for radius 3
degrees_to_radians should convert 180 degrees to pi
